title: Workform - Exclude Some Domain for Email Field
excerpt:
A feature to exclude some domains, possibly via regex or upload list, when users are submitting a workform with email field. 
The chance to exclude temporary email services and specifically domains, it will be useful in …

posts.author: Alfonso (Alfonso)
posts.cookedHtml:
A feature to exclude some domains, possibly via regex or upload list, when users are submitting a workform with email field.

The chance to exclude temporary email services and specifically domains, it will be useful in b2b projects.

Thanks
